fields.name: Run Id
fields.tooltip: Specifies the identifier of the run.

fields.name: Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies the status of the reminder action group log entry.

fields.name: Started On
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date and time when the reminder action group log entry was started.

fields.name: Completed On
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date and time when the reminder action group log entry was completed.
